zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，短线测试上方阻力
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体处于震荡偏强结构，价格运行于20日均线上方，短线延续小幅上行节奏，但动能仍偏温和，多头尚未形成明显突破行情。

技术指标方面，MACD处于零轴上方并保持正值，显示多头动能仍在积累，但信号线缺失限制判断强度；RSI未提供，需结合成交结构观察超买风险。

支撑位关注6.64一线及6.6357前低区域，若跌破或转弱；上方阻力集中在6.68近期高点及6.70整数关口，突破后或打开进一步上行空间。

操作上建议短线回调接近支撑分批低吸，突破6.68后顺势跟进，若跌破6.64则需及时止损观望，整体以震荡偏多思路对待。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading in a narrow consolidation phase around 6.67, showing minimal 24-hour change of 0.14%. Price action remains slightly above the 20-period SMA at 6.6477, suggesting a mild bullish bias but lacking strong momentum. The market structure indicates equilibrium after a recent push higher, with volatility compressing. Overall trend is neutral-to-slightly bullish, as buyers continue to defend the mid-6.60s zone while sellers cap upside attempts near recent highs.

MACD at 0.0488 reflects a modest positive momentum reading, though the absence of a confirmed signal line reduces reliability of trend strength assessment. This typically points to early or weakening bullish momentum rather than a fully established trend. With RSI unavailable, price positioning relative to moving averages and range boundaries becomes more important. Conditions remain balanced, with neither overbought nor oversold pressure dominating.

Key support is aligned with the SMA20 at 6.6477, followed closely by the session low at 6.6357, forming a tight demand zone. A breakdown below this area could expose the 6.60 psychological level as the next major support. On the upside, resistance is firmly located at 6.6826, with a sustained break potentially opening room toward 6.70 and then 6.75 as the next extension targets.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies in the short term, with breakout confirmation offering higher conviction setups. Long positions may be considered on holds above 6.65 with protective stops below 6.63, targeting resistance at 6.68 and 6.70. Alternatively, traders may fade resistance near 6.68 while maintaining tight risk control. A decisive breakout will likely define the next directional phase.
